_comment: Cleave A layer-boundary residuals — the 4-layer DAG is structurally violated in 23 shipped-source spots the cleave introduced (masked until D201's rule existed). FULL re-layering (class A: reclassify domain-agnostic resilience backoff/_internal/status -> base/; class B: utils/<domain> barrels must stop re-exporting presets — load-bearing for ~82 test imports, needs codemod; class C: genuine utils->presets code inversions in harness/* + ai/agents/agent.ts) is deferred to the next batch as ONE coherent slice with its own gate run. Tracked in docs/optimizations.md 'Cleave A layer-boundary residuals'. RATCHET: a NEW violation (not listed) fails the build; a listed entry no longer firing ALSO fails (forces removal as fixes land). Do NOT add entries to silence new violations — fix the layering.
